title: Mazars Comment: Want a way back to economic and political sanity? Look at Britain
section_path: Mazars Comment: Want a way back to economic and political sanity? Look at Britain
section_path_text: Mazars Comment: Want a way back to economic and political sanity? Look at Britain
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
Currently, the data is inconclusive. Some show recession, and some very strong growth. Heightened macroeconomic volatility means that there's a growing probability that policymakers will miss the mark.
